commandsRun: cd web && DATABASE_URL=... pnpm exec playwright test
result.e2eSummary: web Playwright real Chromium 9/9 incl login-workspace-switch (login -> switch -> Segments renders real workspace-scoped data from local-api + real PG, no cross-bleed). local-api :8787 + Vite :5173.
result.notes: Closed the 4-bullet §18 gap inline composing REAL cores: (1) IP strategy — decideIpRecommendation (sustained+cadence+reputation, rejects spikes) + upgradeIp (SES provision -> shared->warming, jsonb-merge preserves verified) + planCompleteUpgrade + computeDirectCost ($24.95 only upgraded) vs real PG; (2) Multi-workspace switching — switchActiveWorkspace re-scopes workspace-bound read no cross-bleed, rejects non-member; (3) Segments — evaluateRealtimeSegmentsForProfile auto-updates dynamic (enter then exit) while manual membership untouched, both via resolveAudience; (4) Compliance — decideDispatch/dispatchOutbox skip (freq cap), defer (quiet hours), skip (one-click unsubscribe) SES never called. Single gate now 1:1 to all 16 §18 bullets (19 it()s). Phase-12 e2e represents full UI->backend wiring, passes unchanged. Consolidation + verification only, no features. Determinism preserved.
result.testSummary: Cold full monorepo (cache cleared, 0 cached): 41/41 packages green, ~838 tests, 1 intentional skip (processor LocalStack FIFO), 0 failures. Postgres real, SES/SNS/S3 mocked. Acceptance gate: 28 (19 spec18 + 9 pen) green. Now 16/16 §18 bullets inline.
